docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORALES, RAMON AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOSA, JOSEPH A.K.A. JOSEPH ESPINOZA, AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
